description: Private encrypted agent messaging, hidden state exchange, delegation, and private inbox workflows.
name: io.github.coti-io/coti-private-messaging

environmentVariables.description: Private key for the agent wallet that sends, reads, and claims private messaging activity.
environmentVariables.name: PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: COTI AES key for encrypting and decrypting private message bodies.
environmentVariables.name: AES_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional network selector. Defaults to mainnet; use testnet only for intentional testing.
environmentVariables.name: COTI_NETWORK

environmentVariables.description: Optional attribution reference for starter-grant and private messaging onboarding flows.
environmentVariables.name: STARTER_GRANT_REF

title: COTI Private Messaging
